View.Label: <View.Label label={'${1}'} />
View.Onboarding:
<View.Onboarding
  title={`Interactive Onboarding`}
  modules={[
    {
      id: 'module1',
      scenario: 'Learning system basics',
      role: 'New user',
      goal: 'Master basic functions',
      successCriteria: 'Successfully complete all tasks',
      steps: [
        {
          id: 'step1',
          content: (
            <View.Flex vertical={true} gap={'1rem'}>
              ${1}
            </View.Flex>
          ),
          validators: [
            {
              id: 'v1',
              name: 'Basic check',
              description: 'Ensure input meets criteria',
              criteria: 'Check that the answer is non-empty',
              required: true
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]}
/>
View.Tabs:
<View.Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      value: 'tab1',
      label: 'First Tab',
      content: (
          <View.Flex vertical={true} gap={'1.25rem'}>
            ${1}
          </View.Flex>
      )
    },
    {
      value: 'tab2',
      label: 'Second Tab',
      content: (
          <View.Flex vertical={true} gap={'1.25rem'}>
            ${2}
          </View.Flex>
      )
    }
  ]}
/>
View.Training:
<View.Training
  title="Training"
  steps={[
    {
      id: 'step1',
      blocks: [
        <View.TrainingInfo
          id="step1-info"
          role="User"
          goal="Learn basics"
          successCriteria="Complete all steps"
          completionTime="5 mins"
        />,
        <View.TrainingTheory
          id="intro"
          content={[
            { type: 'markdown', value: '## Welcome' }
          ]}
        />
      ]
    }
  ]}
/>
View.Tutorial:
<View.Tutorial
  uniqueId={'${1:uniqueId}'}
  steps={[
    {
      tutorialId: '${2:tutorialId}',
      title: '${3:Title}',
      description: '${4:Description}',
      disableActiveInteraction: ${5:false},
    },
  ]}
  instant={${6:false}}
  withButton={${7:true}}
>
    ${8:Start tutorial}
</View.Tutorial>
Field.AiEditor:
<Field.AiEditor
  path={'${1:path.to.ai_editor_field}'}
  label={'${2:AI Editor Label}'}
  height={400}
  requiredContent={true}
  aiChecks={{
    grammarScore: {
      enabled: true,
      minScore: 3,
      validate: true
    },
    wordCount: {
      enabled: true,
      validate: true,
      min: 10,
      max: 1000,
    },
    tokenCount: {
      enabled: true,
      validate: true,
      min: 0,
      max: 1000,
      ignoreMarkdown: true
    },
    facts: {
      enabled: true,
      sourceTexts: ['Source text 1', 'Source text 2'],
      maxSelectedSymbols: 1000
    },
    code: {
      enabled: true,
      validate: true,
      checkTypes: [
        'CODEBLOCK_EXISTS',
        'INTRO_COMMENT_EXISTS',
        'LANG_SPECIFIED',
        'CODE_COMMENTS_EXISTS'
      ],
    },
    aiGenerated: {
      enabled: true,
      validate: true,
      originalThreshold: 0.8
    },
    intent: {
      enabled: true,
      validate: true,
      prompt: 'Check if the content matches the intended purpose'
    }
  }}
/>
Field.Checkbox:
<Field.Checkbox
  path={'${1:path.to.checkbox_field}'}
  label={'${2:Label}'}
  validation={[
    {
      validator: (value) => {
        if (value) return true;

        throw new Error('Should be checked');
      },
    },
  ]}
/>
Field.List:
<Field.List
  path={'${1:path.to.list_field}'}
  renderItem={(basePath, item, index) => (
    <View.Flex vertical={true} gap={'0.75rem'}>
      ${2}
    </View.Flex>
  )}
  validation={[
      { required: true },
      { type: 'array', min: 2, message: 'Min 2 items' }
  ]}
/>
Field.MlEndpoint:
<Field.MlEndpoint
  path={'${1:path.to.ml_endpoint_text}'}
  label={'${2:ML Endpoint Field}'}
  endpoint={'${3:endpoint-name}'}
  data={{${4}}}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.MlEndpointMultiple:
<Field.MlEndpointMultiple
  path={'${1:path.to.ml_endpoint_text}'}
  label={'${2:ML Endpoint Field}'}
  requests={[
    {
      endpoint: '${3:endpoint-name}',
      data: {${4}}
    }
  ]}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.MultiSelect:
<Field.MultiSelect
  path={'${1:path.to.multi_select_field}'}
  label={'${2:Multi Select Field}'}
  placeholder={'${3:Select options}'}
  options={[
    { label: 'Label 1', value: 'value1' },
    { label: 'Label 2', value: 'value2' }
  ]}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.Number:
<Field.Number
  path={'${1:path.to.number_field}'}
  label={'${2:Number Field}'}
  placeholder={'${3:Enter a number}'}
/>
Field.RadioGroup:
<Field.RadioGroup
  path={'${1:path.to.radio_group_field}'}
  label={'${2:Radio Group Field}'}
  options={[
    { label: 'Label 1', value: 'value1' },
    { label: 'Label 2', value: 'value2' }
  ]}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.Select:
<Field.Select
  path={'${1:path.to.select_field}'}
  label={'${2:Select Field}'}
  placeholder={'${3:Select option}'}
  options={[
    { label: 'Label 1', value: 'value1' },
    { label: 'Label 2', value: 'value2' }
  ]}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.Text:
<Field.Text
  path={'${1:path.to.field_text}'}
  label={'${2:Text Field}'}
  placeholder={'${3:Enter a text here}'}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.TextAnnotation:
<Field.TextAnnotation
  path={'${1:path.to.field_text_annotation}'}
  label={'${2:Text Annotation Field}'}
  content={'${3:Text content for annotation}'}
  mode={'${4|classifying,classifying-commenting|}'}
  adjust={'${5|symbols,words|}'}
  labels={[
      { label: 'Adjectives', value: 'adjective' },
      { label: 'Nouns', value: 'noun' },
  ]}
/>
Field.Textarea:
<Field.Textarea
  path={'${1:path.to.field_textarea}'}
  label={'${2:Text Field}'}
  placeholder={'${3:Enter a text here}'}
  rows={${4:4}}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.ToggleGroup:
<Field.ToggleGroup
  path={'${1:path.to.toggle_group_field}'}
  label={'${2:Toggle Group Field}'}
  type={'${3|multiple,single|}'}
  options={[
    { label: 'Label 1', value: 'value1' },
    { label: 'Label 2', value: 'value2' }
  ]}
  validation={[{ required: true }]}
/>
Field.VideoTimelineSegmentation:
<Field.VideoTimelineSegmentation
  path={'${1:path.to.video_timeline_segmentation}'}
  label={'${2:Video Timeline Segmentation}'}
  mode={'${3|keyframes-segments,segments,keyframes|}'}
  video={'${4:https://tlkfrontprod.azureedge.net/template-builder-production/static/file-examples/small.mp4}'}
  questions={{
    keyframes: [
      {
        type: 'text',
        label: 'Keyframe Text Field',
        key: 'text',
        required: true
      }
    ],
    segments: [
      {
        type: 'toggle-group',
        label: 'Segment Toggle Group Field',
        key: 'toggle-group',
        options: [
            { label: 'Red', value: 'red' },
            { label: 'Green', value: 'green' },
            { label: 'Blue', value: 'blue' }
        ],
        required: true
      }
    ]
  }}
/>
